title: record_qualification downgrades 'booked' leads back to 'qualified'
description: status: complete ? 'qualified' : lead.status — if lead is already 'booked', 'handoff', or 'abandoned', this overwrites it with 'qualified' whenever all criteria are present. The model re-calls record_qualification on new info, so a booked lead gets silently downgraded.

title: ensureLead race condition with parallel tool calls in same step
description: Vercel AI SDK executes all tool calls in a single model step concurrently. If model emits record_qualification + book_viewing simultaneously on anonymous conv (lead_id=null), both read lead_id=null, both call createLead(), both call updateConversation — last write wins, orphaning the other lead.
fix: Add DB-level unique constraint on conversations.lead_id, or serialize the create-and-attach with SELECT FOR UPDATE. Or move lazy-create to a pre-turn setup step.

title: Empty-reply fallback dispatched to admin Telegram for main_assistant turns
description: shouldDispatchReply returns true for main_assistant. When turn produces no text, storedContent is set to 'Je suis désolé…' and dispatched to admin's Telegram even if tools ran successfully.
fix: Skip dispatch (and storing the fallback) when toolCalls.length > 0 and reply is empty — tool-only turns are valid. Only use fallback for turns that had no tool calls and no text.

title: bulk_follow_up N+1 DB queries + no per-lead error isolation
description: for-of loop calls getConversationByLeadId per lead (N+1 queries). A single dispatchReply failure throws and aborts remaining leads silently.
fix: Batch-fetch conversations. Wrap per-lead block in try/catch, record failed leads in result.

title: get_lead_viewings full-table scan — listBookedViewings loads all rows
description: listBookedViewings() fetches every viewing row then filters in JS. Same pattern in weekly_report and listing_performance. Unbounded as viewings table grows.
fix: Add lead_id param to listBookedViewings or create getViewingsByLeadId with SQL WHERE lead_id = $1.

title: trigger_lead_turn hardcodes 'fr' language
description: runAgentTurn always called with 'fr' regardless of lead's actual conversation language. English leads get French-biased system prompt on admin-triggered turns.
fix: Persist lang on conversation row, or read it from the conversation and pass the actual language.

title: Dead code: jan/jul/stdOffset use server local timezone, never referenced
description: stdOffset is computed from server's getTimezoneOffset() (not Paris), and is never referenced. Actual offset correctly comes from Intl.DateTimeFormat path.

title: Dead file: finish-reply-tool.ts no longer imported anywhere
description: finish_reply was removed from all agent tool builders. File remains but is orphaned. Its execute also never used the message param (would have silently discarded replies).
